author: Przemyslaw Cichosz
name: SP8192 Family3+ QK5.75 TTT16K LR0.0075
blurb: April-9 SP8192 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals + legal score-first TTT stack, pushed with QK_GAIN_INIT=5.75 and 16K-token legal TTT chunks at TTT_LR=0.0075. One 8xH100 SXM run reached 1.07955293 BPB under the 16,000,000 byte cap and under both 10-minute training/eval limits.
record_margin_note: This one-seed result beats the public README leaderboard BPB of 1.0810, but may not satisfy the separate 0.005-nat new-record margin and p<0.01 statistical-evidence requirements without additional independent runs.
technique_summary: SP8192 tokenizer, 11L x 512d x 8H/4KV, 3-layer depth recurrence, parallel residuals from layer 7, QK gain 5.75, MuonEq-R/AdamW training, EMA 0.9965, GPTQ SDClip int6 matrices + int8 embeddings, Brotli packing, legal score-first SGD TTT with 16K chunks, 3 epochs, LR 0.0075.
